title: Physiotherapy and Rehabilitation Mission and Vision
content:
Physiotherapy and Rehabilitation Mission and Vision

Vision

To make the field of physiotherapy and rehabilitation more effective in improving public health and prosperity,

To be a respected and leading department in the field with professional autonomy, which is followed and cited in the international scientific platform by creating priority services and policies.

Mission

To train physiotherapists and health professionals with life-long learning, teaching and communication skills, respectful to universal and cultural values as well as human rights,

To work for the acquisition of professional autonomy,

To conduct multidisciplinary studies,

To conduct  postgraduate  programs and researches,

To utilize Physiotherapy Rehabilitation services and technologies to have a healthier society..
